raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The California Middle Class Pipeline Project aims to eliminate traditional barriers to career technical education and workforce development programs.",
    "The Pipeline Project will collaborate with educational institutions and private industry to modernize career technical education in California.",
    "The Pipeline Project will focus on the demands of emerging industries such as information technology, artificial intelligence, healthcare, and the green economy.",
    "Senate Bill 638 aims to connect Californians with the necessary supports and services to enter quality training programs.",
    "The California State Budget includes $1.5 million to establish the Middle Class Pipeline Project and $150 million for strategic grants for workforce development in high-unemployment and low-income regions."
  ]
}
```
